I'm a big fun of U2, Derek said.

 Derek said he__________a big fan of U2.

"We're watching TV" said the twins. 

The twins said they___________TV.

"You've been annoying me all day!" my mum said. 

My mum said I__________her all day.

"The dog ate my homework!" said Ivan. 

Ivan said the dog______________his homework.

"At one o'clock, I was having lunch", said Molly. 

Molly said she___________lunch at one o'clock.

"You'll get wet without an umbrella", Dad said.

Dad said I____________wet without am umbrella.

"He can juggle five balls", said Angile.

Angile said he__________five balls.

"You must dive me your essays," Mrs Vine said. 

Mrs Vine said we_________give her our essays.
